Hero concept review / 03 versions

Live comparison

Choose the direction
that feels more Arnology.

Three independent directions: the original interactive Product Core, a cinematic workspace story, and a warm editorial AI product experience inspired by the Refero reference.

New Open concept ↗
01 / Cinematic workspace

Real objects. Clearer story.

A full-width video hero where a modern workspace assembles piece by piece, representing Arnology’s combined product, engineering, and team capabilities.

02 / Product Core

Interactive. Abstract. Engineered.

The currently deployed Three.js concept, preserved as a separate version for direct visual and interaction comparison.

03 / Product intelligence

Generative. Editorial. Alive.

A living signal field where scattered ideas become an ordered product direction through pointer distortion, pulses, and procedural motion.
